items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between .4 miles south of Exit 20: COLUMBUS BLVD/WASHINGTON AVE and .6 miles north of Exit 20: COLUMBUS BLVD/WASHINGTON AVE. There is a lane restriction.
